items.title: Toyota, Daimler Truck and Volvo partner on hydrogen fuel-cell trucking | Fox News
items.summary: So when Toyota Motor Corporation decided to team up with Daimler Truck and Volvo Group, it raised a fair question: Why double down on hydrogen now? The three companies plan to become equal partners in Cellcentric, a venture focused on fuel-cell systems for heavy-duty trucks and industrial vehicles.
